name: Whistling Straits (Straits)
green_fee_notes: The resort does not publish rack rates; peak-season Straits green fees are reported around $645 per person for 2025-26, plus a $90 caddie fee, and advance tee times generally require Destination Kohler lodging.
notable: Hosted the PGA Championship in 2004 (Vijay Singh), 2010 (Martin Kaymer), and 2015 (Jason Day)
Hosted the 2021 Ryder Cup, won by the USA 19-9
Walking-only course with caddies; carts are not allowed
Pete Dye links layout along two miles of Lake Michigan shoreline; also hosted the 2007 U.S. Senior Open

confidence.lat_lng: Wikipedia clubhouse-area coordinate; the property spans about two miles of shoreline.
confidence.green_fee_notes: Official rates page confirms the $90 caddie fee and walking-only policy but not the rack green fee; ~$645 peak figure is third-party reporting (Nov 2025).
confidence.ratings: All ratings/slopes and per-hole data from the official Straits scorecard PDF, cross-verified against GolfPass (exact match for men's tees). USGA NCRDB unreachable (403).
confidence.address: Course sits in Haven (Town of Mosel) with a Sheboygan mailing address.
